'''TRAGOF1103''' or '''[[Tralus Ground Occupation Forces]] Number 1103''', was [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter]] in [[Hardpoint Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
